report.summary: UX audit and visual polish for Stablecoin Yield Tracker tool, Portfolio Rebalancing guide, and Crypto Staking guide — created 2 OG images, added Table of Contents, fixed redundant content, improved accessibility and link targets.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Table of Contents with 10 anchor-linked sections to Portfolio Rebalancing guide (was missing entirely — long guide with no navigation)
Added id attributes to all 10 h2 headings in Portfolio Rebalancing guide for ToC anchor navigation
ToC links have 44px minimum touch targets for mobile accessibility
Removed redundant 'Mechanism Description' block from StablecoinYieldTracker cards (duplicated riskNote text)
Added target='_blank' to StablecoinYieldTracker 'Earn Yield' CTA links for proper external link behavior
Added focus-within outline (2px solid #6366f1) to StablecoinYieldTracker cards for keyboard navigation visibility
Added aria-label='Filter stablecoins by chain, risk, and type' to StablecoinYieldTracker filter group for screen readers
Identified tokenomics page 'use client' + metadata export conflict in Degen0x workspace (build-breaking pattern — flagged for next build cycle)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with pie chart allocation visualization (BTC 40%/ETH 25%/Alts 20%/DeFi 15%), strategy pills (Time-Based, Threshold-Based, Hybrid, AI-Powered), stats badges (15% Threshold, +1-3% APR, 4 Strategies), degen0x branding

OG image: og-crypto-staking-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with stacked coin visualizations (ETH 3.2%/SOL 6.8%/ATOM 15.1% APY), yield arrows, topic pills (Liquid Staking, Restaking, Validators, Risk Analysis), stats badges ($40B+ Staked ETH, 10+ Chains, 3-15% APY), degen0x branding

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: Fixed Portfolio Rebalancing page: Replaced generic API-generated OG image URL with custom SVG (og-crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026.svg) in both openGraph and twitter metadata

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker — 4 issues found (redundant mechanism block, missing target=_blank, no focus-within on cards, no filter aria-label), all resolved
/learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026 — 3 issues found (generic OG image, no ToC, no section anchor IDs), all resolved
/learn/crypto-staking-guide-2026 — 1 issue found (OG image missing from main workspace), resolved by creating SVG
/learn/tokenomics-crypto-token-economics-guide-2026 (Degen0x workspace) — 1 critical issue flagged ('use client' + metadata export conflict), deferred to build cycle
